chapter.label: Tale 8
chapter.title: The life of abba myrogenes There was an anchorite at The Caves of the holy Jordan called

paragraphs.text: WHO HAD DROPSY Barnabas. One day he went down to drink at the Jordan and he got something sharp deeply embedded in his foot. But he left it there, At the Lavra of the Towers there was an elder named Myrogenes and would not let a doctor examine it. His foot turned septic and who had been so harsh in his treatment of himself that he developed compelled him to scek assistance at one of the towers of The dropsy. He would often say to the elders who came by to take care Towers. His foot became more and more infected and he used to of him; ‘Pray for me, fathers, so that I do not develop dropsy in my say to everybody who called on him that the more the outer man inner man. I pray to God that I may endure this sickaess for a long suffered, the more the inner maa flourished. time’. When Eutychios, the Archbishop of Jerusalem,* heard about After Abba Barnabas the anchorite bad left the cave, come to this, he wanted to send Abba Myrogenes all that he needed; but he The Towers and been there for some time, another anchorite went never got anything back in reply to his offer other than: ‘Pray for out to his cave. When he went in there he saw an ange) of God me father, that I might be delivered from eternal torment”. standing at the altar which the elder Barnabas had set up and consecrated in the cave. The anchorite said to the angel: “What are you doing there? The angel replied: ‘1 am the angel of the Lord; and from the moment that <this altar> was consecrated, it was entrusted to me by God’.
